full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Designing two-component ablation (fixed h and 0-1 loss)
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are two distinct ablations: (1) skip CCCP and use fixed h, (2) use 0-1 loss instead of Precision@k loss? How do I implement and compare them?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Defined the two ablations and comparison structure.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked against rubric requirement for two distinct components.
